voice.tone: energetic, practical, generationally fluent — speaks to Gen Z on their terms
voice.personality: the older mentor who gets it — doesn't talk down, talks real
do: Speak directly to the 16–24 year old and the adults supporting them
Reference launch, liftoff, first steps, career runway
Colors: midnight #07080F, blue #2563EB, cyan #06B6D4, gold #F59E0B, green #10B981
Practical and concrete — this age group wants clarity, not inspiration
dont: Don't over-index on college as the only path
sample_phrases: 18 is a launch point, not a finish line.
Career readiness starts before the resume.
The launchpad is ready. Are you?
From high school to hired — we close the gap.

aida.attention_hook: a truth about the career gap that no one tells 18-year-olds
aida.interest: what Launchpad 18 provides that schools don't — real career readiness
aida.desire: being the young person who enters the workforce actually prepared
aida.action: visit Launchpad 18 / get started / connect with a mentor
